command.equivox.knowledge.invalid: The item "%1$s" does not  have an EMC value, and cannot be learnt.
configuration.equivox.client.tooltips.le: Requires holding shift to display the learnt/unlearnt text as a tooltip on items and blocks. Note: this does nothing if EMC Tooltips are disabled.
configuration.equivox.common.crafting.fu: Require full omega klein stars in the tome of knowledge and gem armour recipes. This is the same behavior that EE2 had.
configuration.equivox.processing.data_co: Calculates EMC value of trimmed armour.
Set to false to disable Gem Armour offensive abilities (helmet zap and chestplate explosion).
configuration.equivox.server.misc.unsafe: False requires your hand be empty for Gem Armour Offensive Abilities to be readied or triggered.
tooltip.equivox.tome: Unlocks all transmutation knowledge when learnt
